title: MANAGEMENT TRAINEE (F&B SUPERVISOR)
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

Gong Yuan Ma La Tang is a 100% locally owned brand that was established in 2017. To provide a unique Ma La cuisine experience while retaining the authenticity of the local fan favourite dish. We offer drinkable Ma La soup bases that do not leave a greasy or overwhelming aftertaste. To ensure that, we constantly refine our soup bases through customer’s feedback as well as research and developments.


Job Summary

Gain comprehensive operational expertise through rotational training and lead initiatives to drive sales growth and profitability across outlets while ensuring compliance, training excellence, and high standards of hygiene.

Responsibilities

Acquire in-depth knowledge of food operations by completing rotational training across departments to support operational excellence.

Drive sales performance and improve profitability by implementing effective outlet strategies and monitoring key business metrics.

Master restaurant operations by managing manpower scheduling, administrative processes, and inventory control to optimize efficiency.

Lead and oversee the training of new employees, monitoring their progress to ensure skill development and operational readiness.

Enforce compliance with outlet operational standards, company policies, and safety regulations to maintain a safe and consistent environment.

Maintain cleanliness and hygiene standards in accordance with SFA regulations and company policies to ensure food safety and customer satisfaction

Prepare accurate business reports and support ad-hoc operational duties to inform management decisions.

Evaluate individual employee performance regularly and collaborate with supervisors to facilitate career development and progression.

Benefits

• Competitive remuneration with salary commensurate with experience.

• Enjoy a Staff Meal on us!

• Annual Leave to recharge and rejuvenate.

• Medical Benefits for your well-being.

• Extensive Training and Career Progression opportunities.

• Continuous support with training provided throughout your journey.

postedCompany.description:
Gong Yuan Ma La Tang is a 100% locally owned brand that was established in 2017. To provide a unique Ma La cuisine experience while retaining the authenticity of the local fan favourite dish. We offer drinkable Ma La soup bases that do not leave a greasy or overwhelming aftertaste. To ensure that, we constantly refine our soup bases through customer’s feedback as well as research and developments.

We understand that different people have different dietary needs and spice preferences. Hence, we have other soup bases such as Mushroom, Pork bone, Tomato and Pickled Vegetable soup bases for those who do not enjoy spices. We have also come up with a vegetarian friendly soup for our vegetarian consumers.
postedCompany.name: DEEP GROUNDWATER PTE. LTD.
